Item 1. Business

Item 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data

Annual Report

NVIDIA Corporation annual report cover information and company overview.

Item 1. Business

NVIDIA designs graphics and accelerated computing platforms for gaming, data center, and automotive markets.

The business section explains products, go-to-market channels, and manufacturing partnerships in detail.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

Demand can fluctuate based on macroeconomic conditions, export controls, supply constraints, and customer concentration.

Competition in AI infrastructure and semiconductor markets can reduce pricing power and pressure future margins.

Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis

Management discusses revenue growth, operating expense trends, and capital allocation priorities.

The section also covers inventory planning, customer demand, and data center revenue performance.

Item 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data

Financial statements and related footnote disclosures appear in this section for annual reporting.
